description: Input schema for Grok reference-to-video generation.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video content and motion.
examples: A person walking through a city in the style of the reference images
prompt.title: Prompt

reference_images.description: Reference images for style/content guidance. The generated video will use these images as visual references.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

duration.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds (1-15).
duration.title: Duration

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video.
aspect_ratio.title: Aspect Ratio

resolution.description: Video resolution. 720p for higher quality, 480p for faster generation.
resolution.title: Resolution

title: AppInput
